name: aisa-twitter-engagement-suite-plugin
description: Requires python3, and AISA_API_KEY. Uses a configurable AIsa relay for Twitter/X research, OAuth-gated posting, and user-approved media uploads. Native-first ClawHub plugin for `aisa-twitter-engagement-suite`. Ships the packaged AIsa skill with an `openclaw.plugin.json` manifest and a Claude-compatible bundle fallback. Search X/Twitter profiles, tweets, trends, and OAuth-gated posting through AIsa. Use when: the user needs Twitter research, monitoring, or engagement workflows. Supports search, monitoring, and approved posting.

notes: Uses a configurable AIsa relay for Twitter/X OAuth, research, posting, and engagement.
User-approved media uploads are sent to the configured relay.
